title: Straight From The Shoulder
overview: Straight from the Shoulder was a late night public affairs program of MBC-11 and GMA Network produced by the Manila Broadcasting Company. It was hosted by Louie Beltran until his death. A radio edition also aired on DZRH.

episodes.title: Straight From The Shoulder - Miriam Defensor Santiago Post-Election 1992 Interview
